name: Blueberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine all the dry ingredients and set aside.
3. Reduce the port wine over medium heat until it is reduced to 1/4 cup.
4. Add the reduced port wine and remaining ingredients (except blueberries) to the dry mixture one at a time, stirring constantly until combined and smooth.
5. Gently fold in the blueberries.
6. Lightly spray or wipe a 7 x 11-inch glass baking pan with vegetable oil.
7. Pour the batter into the pan.
8. Bake for 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Serve warm from the oven or cool to room temperature.
